title: Colorful Plant-Based Quinoa Bowl with Roasted Vegetables and Avocado
description: Top view of a vibrant plant-based quinoa bowl featuring roasted sweet potatoes, Brussels sprouts, broccoli, red onion, cherry tomatoes, cucumber slices, purple cabbage, leafy greens, avocado slices sprinkled with black sesame seeds and chili flakes, pumpkin seeds, hummus with olive oil and paprika, and a lime wedge. The bowl is placed on a rustic wooden table with a glass of water with lemon and a small potted herb plant nearby. A fork and spoon rest on a dark cloth napkin beside the bowl. The image showcases a healthy, colorful, and appetizing meal with natural bright lighting and sharp focus.
